name: h11h Foundation
description: Meta feature that packages all h11h-io devcontainer features into a single, configurable feature. Includes: git-identity-from-github, devbox, oh-my-zsh, project-setup, supabase-cli, coder, and userspace-pkg-homes. Individual sub-features can be disabled via the 'disable' option.

disable.description: Comma-separated list of sub-feature IDs to disable. Valid IDs: git-identity-from-github, devbox, oh-my-zsh, project-setup, supabase-cli, coder, userspace-pkg-homes.

gitIdentityOverwrite.description: If true, overwrite any existing git user.name and user.email configuration. (git-identity-from-github)

devboxVersion.description: Version of Devbox to install, or 'latest'. (devbox)

exportGlobalProfile.description: When true, export the global devbox Nix profile into login shells. (devbox)

ohmyzshPlugins.default: git sudo z history colored-man-pages docker python node pnpm direnv zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting
ohmyzshPlugins.description: Space-separated list of Oh My Zsh plugins. (oh-my-zsh)

extraRcSnippets.description: Additional shell code appended to .zshrc after 'source oh-my-zsh.sh'. (oh-my-zsh)

extraRcFile.description: Path to a shell file whose contents are appended to .zshrc. (oh-my-zsh)

nodeSubdirs.description: Space-separated list of subdirectories containing package.json to run install in. (project-setup)

pythonSubdirs.description: Space-separated list of subdirectories containing pyproject.toml to run 'uv sync' in. (project-setup)

envFiles.description: Space-separated list of example:target pairs to copy. (project-setup)

dockerWaitSeconds.description: Seconds to wait for Docker daemon before pre-pulling Supabase images. (supabase-cli)

coderVersion.description: Coder CLI version to install, or 'latest'. (coder)

configurePnpm.description: Configure PNPM_HOME and add it to PATH. (userspace-pkg-homes)

configurePipx.description: Configure PIPX_BIN_DIR and add it to PATH. (userspace-pkg-homes)

configureNpm.description: Configure NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX and add its bin directory to PATH. (userspace-pkg-homes)
